title: Original splashes
description: Replaces the: "GO TO MY PATREON" messages with the original splash texts!
body:
# Are you tired of those promotion splashtexts?


_go to my patreon_

_Insert inside joke of community_

_my username_

_look I know how to make a splashtext!!!1!!!_


**This Resource Pack can overwrite them! It has every splash text from the vanilla game!**
